name: preset-diagnostic-aabbs
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 — 'diagnostic-aabbs' preset. Field + atom AABB wireframes + centroid markers, surface colored by field-ID rainbow. Locks the AABB overlay axis.

setup.vlmDescription: An SDF teapot with multiple AABB wireframes (field bounds + atom bounds) overlaid as colored boxes. Centroid markers visible. The teapot itself is rainbow-colored by field index.
